nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Lophospiza
nodes.summary: Lophospiza（Lophospiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Sulawesi goshawk、凤头鹰。

nodes.name: Sulawesi goshawk
nodes.summary: The Sulawesi goshawk (Lophospiza griseiceps) is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae. It is endemic to Sulawesi, Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. This species was formerly placed in the genus Accipiter. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Sulawesi goshawk (Lophospiza griseiceps) is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae. It is endemic to Sulawesi, Indonesia.

nodes.name: Sulawesi goshawk
